name: Chicken & Vegetables with Gravy
recipeIngredient: 3 To 4 lb. whole broiler/fryer, rinsed well
recipeInstructions:
1. Put the vegetables in a lightly oiled slow cooker.
2. Place the whole chicken in the middle of the vegetables.
3. Sprinkle with seasoned salt, pepper, and basil.
4. Pour water or broth over all.
5. Cover and cook on low for 8 to 10 hours, or on high for 3½ to 4 hours. If cooking on high, increase broth or water to 1 cup.
6. When ready to serve, remove the chicken and vegetables to a serving platter. Reserve the liquid for gravy.
7. Prepare a smooth paste with flour and water. Pour into the liquid.
8. Turn the cooker to high and stir the gravy.
9. Add thyme and soy sauce.
10. When thick, pour over the chicken and vegetables or serve on the side.
Yield: 5 to 6 servings, for $4.30.
